repositories.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
repositories.description_zh: Anthropic 推出的终端式 agentic 编程工具，可理解代码库、执行日常开发任务、解释代码并协助提升编码效率。

repositories.description: Cursor plugin specification and official plugins
repositories.description_zh: Cursor 的插件规范与官方插件仓库，适合了解 Cursor 插件的结构、能力边界和扩展方式。

repositories.description: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
repositories.description_zh: VoxCPM2 是一个无需 tokenizer 的多语言语音生成模型，支持创意音色设计和接近真实效果的声音克隆。

repositories.description: A platform for reproducible world model research and evaluation
repositories.description_zh: 一个面向世界模型研究与评测的平台，强调可复现的实验流程，适合开展模型对比和评估。

repositories.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.
repositories.description_zh: 一个可离线运行的自包含生存信息终端，整合关键工具、知识和 AI 能力，面向断网或应急场景。

repositories.description: A fast, helpful, and open-source document parser
repositories.description_zh: 一个快速、易用的开源文档解析器，适合文档处理、知识库导入和 AI 数据预处理。

repositories.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.
repositories.description_zh: 基于 ClashMeta 的多平台代理客户端，界面简洁、开源且无广告，适合跨设备网络代理管理。

repositories.description: A straightforward method for training your LLM, from downloading data to generating text.
repositories.description_zh: 一套从零训练 LLM 的直观教程，覆盖数据下载、训练流程到文本生成，适合入门理解完整链路。

repositories.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
repositories.description_zh: 利用普通 WiFi 信号实现实时空间感知、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需摄像头视频画面。

repositories.description: Data Engineering Zoomcamp is a free 9-week course on building production-ready data pipelines. The next cohort starts in January 2026. Join the course here 👇🏼
repositories.description_zh: 一门免费的 9 周数据工程课程，围绕生产级数据管道建设，适合系统学习数据工程实践。
